title: Brachyelytrum aristosum
taxonomy: Brachyelytrum aristosum is classified in the kingdom Plantae, specifically within the family Poaceae. It belongs to the order Poales and the family is further divided into the subfamily Bambusoideae. The genus Brachyelytrum is monotypic, meaning it contains only one species, B. aristosum. This classification is based on its morphological and anatomical characteristics. The plant is a type of grass that is native to North America.
